tasks.label: Run frontend dev server with nvm
tasks.command: source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20.14.0 >/dev/null && cd front-end && npm start

tasks.label: Install frontend dependencies with nvm
tasks.command: source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20.14.0 >/dev/null && cd front-end && npm install
